member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.AnnouncementController.GetAll
member.summary: GET /Announcement — List all announcements, newest first.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.AnnouncementController.Create(Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Models.Announcement)
member.summary: POST /Announcement — Admin only: create a new announcement.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.AnnouncementController.Update(System.String,Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Models.Announcement)
member.summary: PUT /Announcement/{id} — Admin only: edit an existing announcement.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.AnnouncementController.Delete(System.String)
member.summary: DELETE /Announcement/{id} — Admin only.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.AnnouncementController.GetReadState
member.summary: GET /Announcement/Read — Get user's last read state.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.AnnouncementController.SetReadState(System.Text.Json.JsonElement)
member.summary: POST /Announcement/Read — Set user's last read state.

member.name: T:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.ArrController
member.summary: Lightweight proxy for Sonarr / Radarr API calls used by the *arr integration frontend. All endpoints require Jellyfin authentication. Admin-only endpoints are tagged accordingly.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.ArrController.SonarrQueue
member.summary: Returns the current Sonarr download queue.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.ArrController.RadarrQueue
member.summary: Returns the current Radarr download queue.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.ArrController.SeriesSlug(System.String)
member.summary: Looks up the Sonarr titleSlug for a series by TVDB ID. Used by the arr-links frontend to construct a deep link into Sonarr.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.ArrController.Queue
member.summary: Returns a unified download queue object: { sonarr: [...], radarr: [...] }. Each inner array contains the raw queue records from the respective *arr instance. Both fetch concurrently. If one fails, the other's results are still returned.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.ArrController.TestSonarr
member.summary: Tests Sonarr connectivity. Returns { success, version }.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.ArrController.TestRadarr
member.summary: Tests Radarr connectivity. Returns { success, version }.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.ArrController.SonarrProfiles
member.summary: Returns Sonarr Quality Profiles.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.ArrController.RadarrProfiles
member.summary: Returns Radarr Quality Profiles.

member.name: T:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.BrandingController
member.summary: API controller for managing custom branding images. Supports upload (from computer), serve, delete, and status check for icon-transparent, favicon, banner-light, and banner-dark.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.BrandingController.GetBrandingImage(System.String)
member.summary: GET /Branding/{type} — Serves the uploaded branding image. No auth required. type: icon-transparent | favicon | banner-light | banner-dark

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.BrandingController.UploadBrandingImage(System.String,Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile)
member.summary: POST /Branding/{type} — Upload a branding image. Admin only.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.BrandingController.DeleteBrandingImage(System.String)
member.summary: DELETE /Branding/{type} — Delete a branding image. Admin only.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.BrandingController.GetBrandingStatus
member.summary: GET /Branding/Status — Returns which branding images exist. Requires login.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.ChatController.GetMyCode
member.summary: Returns the current user's unique chat code (first 6 chars of userId, uppercase).

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.ChatController.GetUserByCode(System.String)
member.summary: Find a user by their 6-char unique chat code.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.ChatController.GetOnlineCount
member.summary: Returns count of currently active sessions (online users).

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.ScheduledTaskController.ResolveNextEventUtc(Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Models.ScheduledTask)
member.summary: Resolves the next future execution UTC for a task. For recurring tasks whose stored date is in the past, advances by the recurrence period.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.ScheduledTaskController.EvaluateAndPostAnnouncement(Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Models.ScheduledTask,System.Collections.Generic.List{Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Models.Announcement})
member.summary: Immediately evaluates whether an announcement should be created/updated for a task. Called after any create or update so users don't have to wait for the hourly scheduler.

member.name: T:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.SeerrController
member.summary: Backend proxy for all Jellyseerr/Overseerr API calls. Keeps the API key server-side (never exposed to browser). Caches responses in-memory with configurable TTL to prevent excessive external calls.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.SeerrController.GetConfig
member.summary: GET /Seerr/Config — Returns Seerr feature flags (no API key).

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.SeerrController.GetMovie(System.Int32)
member.summary: GET /Seerr/Movie/{tmdbId}

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.SeerrController.GetMovieSimilar(System.Int32)
member.summary: GET /Seerr/Movie/{tmdbId}/Similar

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.SeerrController.GetMovieRecommendations(System.Int32)
member.summary: GET /Seerr/Movie/{tmdbId}/Recommendations

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.SeerrController.GetTv(System.Int32)
member.summary: GET /Seerr/Tv/{tmdbId}

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.SeerrController.GetTvSimilar(System.Int32)
member.summary: GET /Seerr/Tv/{tmdbId}/Similar

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.SeerrController.GetTvRecommendations(System.Int32)
member.summary: GET /Seerr/Tv/{tmdbId}/Recommendations

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.SeerrController.Discover(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: GET /Seerr/Discover/{type}?... — type: movies, tv, keyword, etc.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.SeerrController.CreateRequest
member.summary: POST /Seerr/Request — Submit a media request.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.SeerrController.DeleteRequest(System.Int32)
member.summary: DELETE /Seerr/Request/{requestId} — Cancel a request.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.SeerrController.GetRadarrServers
member.summary: GET /Seerr/Radarr — List all configured Radarr servers.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.SeerrController.GetRadarrServerDetails(System.Int32)
member.summary: GET /Seerr/Radarr/{serverId} — Radarr server details (profiles + root folders).

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.SeerrController.GetSonarrServers
member.summary: GET /Seerr/Sonarr — List all configured Sonarr servers.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.SeerrController.GetSonarrServerDetails(System.Int32)
member.summary: GET /Seerr/Sonarr/{serverId} — Sonarr server details (profiles + root folders).

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.SeerrController.GetUser
member.summary: GET /Seerr/User — Gets Seerr user corresponding to current Jellyfin session.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.SeerrController.GetRequestCount
member.summary: GET /Seerr/RequestCount — Get request quota for current user.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.SeerrController.TestSeerr
member.summary: POST /Seerr/Test — Test Seerr API connectivity.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Api.SeerrController.TestTmdb
member.summary: POST /Seerr/TestTmdb — Test TMDB API key.

member.name: P:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Models.EncryptedPrivateMessage.Content
member.summary: Plain text content (used when E2E is not set up).

member.name: P:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Models.EncryptedPrivateMessage.Ciphertext
member.summary: Base64 encoded AES-GCM ciphertext (optional, for E2E encrypted DMs).

member.name: T:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Models.PatchRequestPayload
member.summary: Payload type passed by the File Transformation Plugin to registered callback methods. Must strictly match the deserialization layout so Jellyfin doesn't crash during intercept.

member.name: P:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Plugin.BrandingDirectory
member.summary: Gets the path to the custom branding images directory.

member.name: T:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.ScriptInjectionMiddleware
member.summary: Middleware that injects the latestmedia.js script into any index.html response served by Jellyfin. Uses the same approach as jellyfin-plugin-ratings. No external dependencies or file system write access required.

member.name: T:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.ScriptInjectionStartupFilter
member.summary: Startup filter that registers the ScriptInjectionMiddleware into the ASP.NET Core pipeline at application startup. Pattern from K3ntas/jellyfin-plugin-ratings.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Services.DeletionSchedulerService.DeleteFromRadarr(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Deletes a movie from Radarr using its TMDB ID so it won't be re-imported.

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Services.DeletionSchedulerService.DeleteFromSonarr(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Deletes a series from Sonarr using its TVDB ID so it won't be re-imported.

member.name: T:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Services.WatchlistMonitor
member.summary: Monitors library additions to automatically add requested media to user watchlists. Queries Jellyseerr's /api/v1/request bulk endpoint (same as JellyfinEnhanced).

member.name: M:Jellyfin_Latestmedia.Services.WatchlistMonitor.GetAllRequestsCached(System.Net.Http.HttpClient,System.String)
member.summary: Fetches all Jellyseerr requests in a single API call with 30-second caching. Deduplicates in-flight fetches to avoid parallel calls for simultaneous library events.
